response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience with developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, DLang libraries), and clear leadership in open-source and workshop initiatives, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership through open-source projects and workshops
Broad technical stack across languages and platforms including mobile (iOS/Apple TV) and build systems
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership beyond technical mentorship
Limited documentation of experience leading organizational change or strategic roadmap planning
Mobile platform experience is incidental (iOS app maintenance), not deep or ecosystem-focused
